---

Please make sure your bug is not already listed in this repository's GitHub Issues:

https://github.com/v1k70rk4/HASS.Agent.NET10-Integration/issues

If you are not sure, do not worry, just go ahead and we will discuss it.

----

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Environment (please complete the following):**
 - Home Assistant version:
 - HASS.Agent .NET10 Integration version:
 - HASS.Agent .NET10 (tray app) version:
 - Installation method: [HACS / Manual]
 - MQTT broker: [Mosquitto add-on / Other]

**Which area is affected?**

 - [ ] Sensors (standard or custom)
 - [ ] Media player
 - [ ] Notifications
 - [ ] Buttons / Commands
 - [ ] Device discovery (MQTT)
 - [ ] Config flow / Setup
 - [ ] Other

**Logs**
If possible, please include relevant Home Assistant logs. You can find them under **Settings > System > Logs**, filter for `hass_agent`.

```
Paste logs here
```

**Additional context**
